title: poa arctica subsp. stricta
intro: Poa arctica subsp. stricta is a subspecies of the Arctic bluegrass plant, a type of grass that grows in the Arctic tundra regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa arctica subsp. stricta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and resilience.
